items.title: Schedule call with Gabriel Kreiman to discuss updated round structure and new term sheet
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: 'We received a new term sheet. Before signing term sheets, we wanted to see if there's a way for us to work together. Do you have a few minutes to catch up?'

items.title: Discuss Opti's internal preemptive round details following May 29 catch-up
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on May 28: 'We closed our first deal earlier this week... existing investors want to preempt with an internal quick round. Is it worth to catch up for 10 mins?' Richie scheduled a call for May 29.

items.title: Follow up with Roy Katmor on Orchid round dynamics after his travel
items.context: Email from Jake on May 27 asking Roy for 'the latest on round dynamics.' Roy previously passed on a TS and expected more in coming weeks, but travel was slowing things down.

items.title: Send intro to Banxware for Simone Garreau (Prism Layer)
items.context: Logan committed in May 31 email reply to Simone: 'will send you an intro to Banxware and will see if SumUp is interested in meeting.'

items.title: Check if SumUp is interested in meeting Prism Layer
items.context: Logan committed in May 31 email: 'will see if SumUp is interested in meeting — they're a scaled / late stage company and tend to build in-house.'

items.title: Prep for CISO Breakfast with Thoropass at NYC Tech Week
items.context: Calendar event 'HOLD: NYTW / CISO Breakfast' on Jun 2 at 114 Crosby St with Thoropass team (javier@thoropass.com, sam@thoropass.com, claire.lamb@thoropass.com).

items.title: Prep talking points for Derek <> Francis (Allstate) catch-up
items.context: Calendar event 'Derek <> Francis Catch Up' on Jun 3 with francis.lowry@allstate.com — recurring LP/strategic relationship meeting.
